findings.title: Avoid a second payload_info scan on URMA Get
findings.impact: Every URMA Get response with payload metadata now calls HasUrmaTcpFallbackPayload before FillUrmaBuffer, and FillUrmaBuffer already walks the same payload_info list to skip TCP fallback entries. Batch Get allows up to 10000 keys, so successful remote Get adds a full extra protobuf repeated-field pass on a foreground hot path.
findings.fix: Fold fallback detection into the existing FillUrmaBuffer pass, for example by returning or filling a bool that records whether any payload_info entry already had part_index entries, then call RecordUrmaDataPlaneResult from that result instead of scanning payload_info separately.
